title: Building an MDX Powered System Architecture
summary: A deep dive case study into constructing a robust type-safe file database pipeline inside Next.js using Contentlayer.

body.raw:
# Architecture Overview

This blog runs entirely on a static pipeline decoupled from the framework UI code layer. By writing clean text inside local text files, we can compilation-check parameters at build-time.

### Code Testing

You can use standard styling wrappers natively out-of-the-box like `const app = express()`.
